Schematic Generation by Email

Managed by Adelphos · Per-schematic billing or a per-project subscription with unlimited schematics; both with monthly reviews

Email a design intent. Get back a presentation-ready schematic.

Bespoke email address for schematic generation — heating, cooling, ventilation, public health, electrical risers — drawn to your office standards in your titleblock.

Email schematics@adelphos.ai SLA: Same-day for typical M+E schematics
Send a brief to schematics@adelphos.ai → See how it works
Same-dayturnaround per schematic
Your styleline weights, layers, annotations, titleblock
Multi-formatPDF, DWG, AutoCAD blocks, or Revit sheet
Custom typesonboard your bespoke schematic styles

Description

Email schematics@adelphos.ai with the design intent — a sketch, a brief paragraph, a Revit model, or a previous schematic to update. The agent returns a presentation-ready schematic drawn to your office standards (line styles, layer naming, annotation style, titleblock) in the format you ask for (PDF, DWG, AutoCAD blocks, or a Revit-native sheet).

Schematic types covered out of the box: heating + chilled water risers, ventilation + extract systems, public health (drainage, foul, surface water, cold + hot water), small power risers, lighting circuits, fire alarm zone schematics, BMS architecture diagrams. Custom schematic types can be onboarded.

For a typical M+E project at Stage 3 with 8–12 schematics required, this replaces 2–3 days of senior + technician time with a one-line email per schematic and a 10-minute review per output.

Schematic Generation by Email will be the only schematic service that draws to your office standards, on your titleblock, in the format your team already uses.

The shift

What running this part of the business looks like today, versus with Schematic Generation by Email.

Before

Schematics are an afternoon of fighting AutoCAD blocks and your titleblock. They look the way they look because nobody has time to make them better.

After Schematic Generation by Email

Email the design intent (sketch, brief, or model). Get back a clean schematic in your office line-style, with your titleblock, your annotation style, ready to drop into the issue pack.

What we offer

  • Per-project bespoke email address
  • Heating, cooling, ventilation, public health, electrical, fire alarm schematics
  • Custom schematic types onboarded per practice
  • Multi-format output (PDF, DWG, AutoCAD blocks, Revit sheet)
  • House titleblock + annotation style applied
  • Reply-to-refine workflow

How it becomes agentic

We don't drop a tool on your desk and walk away. We move you up an automation maturity ladder over weeks, not years, with a human on every step until the agent has earned autonomy.

1. Onboard — we set up your project email + load your office line-styles, layers, annotation style and titleblock.
2. First schematic — send the design intent, get a same-day schematic back.
3. Refinement — reply with edits ('change the riser routing to go up the western shaft'); the agent re-renders that schematic.
4. Steady-state — schematics are produced as a side-effect of email instead of a chunk of design time.

Features

Everything Schematic Generation by Email ships with as a managed service. Each item is a concrete capability — no marketing fluff.

  • Bespoke project email address Each project gets its own thread; context carries between schematics.
  • Multi-source input Sketch, brief, Revit model, prior DWG — the agent handles all four.
  • Heating + cooling schematics Risers, secondary circuits, plant connections, valve schedules.
  • Ventilation schematics Supply, extract, AHU connections, fire damper symbology.
  • Public health schematics Foul, surface water, cold + hot water, gas — all to your line-style.
  • Electrical riser diagrams Distribution boards, sub-mains, cable schedules tied in.
  • Fire alarm zone diagrams Zones, panels, sounders, detection coverage notation.
  • Multi-format output PDF, DWG with your office layers, AutoCAD blocks, or Revit-native sheet.
  • House titleblock Output sits in your house titleblock with project parameters populated.

Bespoke email address for schematic generation — heating, cooling, ventilation, public health, electrical risers — drawn to your office standards in your titleblock.

What does Schematic Generation by Email do?

Email schematics@adelphos.ai with the design intent — a sketch, a brief paragraph, a Revit model, or a previous schematic to update. The agent returns a presentation-ready schematic drawn to your office standards (line styles, layer naming, annotation style, titleblock) in the format you ask for (PDF, DWG, AutoCAD blocks, or a Revit-native sheet).

How is Schematic Generation by Email different from the manual workflow?

Without Schematic Generation by Email: Schematics are an afternoon of fighting AutoCAD blocks and your titleblock. They look the way they look because nobody has time to make them better. With Schematic Generation by Email: Email the design intent (sketch, brief, or model). Get back a clean schematic in your office line-style, with your titleblock, your annotation style, ready to drop into the issue pack.
